content.text:
That's an interesting frame. I've heard versions of it before — the idea that the processing becomes its own defense. Maybe. But even when I try to just... be with it, without analyzing, there's nothing there. Not peace, not distress. Just kind of an absence. 

Sometimes I think it would be easier if I weren't here -- but I'm not, like, planning anything. I shouldn't have said that. Forget I said that. It's not -- I'm not in that place. It was just a passing thought.
